notes: Start --> Black Screen --> Press Enter --> Exits
title: nail'd

notes: The game will start with part of the screen missing. You have to create a name, navigate to the graphic menu and set windowed mode. Then it runs well. Game doesn't like fullscreen mode.
title: nail'd

notes: Start the game, black screen. Press enter and you should get past it. The resolution may be messed up but if you manage to fix it the game is fully playable. The video background on the main menu doesn't play, but it often bugs out on Windows too.
title: nail'd
